gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.lat, T1.lng FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix'
pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT circuits.lat, circuits.lng FROM races JOIN circuits ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId WHERE races.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix';
question: Where is Malaysian Grand Prix held? Give the location coordinates.
